# @anthropic-ai/sdk @ 0.78.0

## Source URLs
- https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/messages
- https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/client-sdks

## API Reference
- Use documented endpoint paths and request body schema.
## Error Handling
- Wrap outbound calls in try/catch and propagate provider status details.
## Security
- Load API keys from environment variables only.
## Best Practices
- Set explicit timeout for every external API request.
- Validate structured vision/message payload before sending.
- Use bounded retries where remote instability is expected.

## Cached Documentation Content

### Source File: docs.anthropic.com_en_api_client-sdks.md
